mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase discount rates for equity valuations, directly suppressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns are positive in >65% of rising rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 4.0 percent, labor market slack triggers earnings recession fears that drive S&P 500 returns negative over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power during non-recession periods.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales rise while housing starts fall simultaneously, the sector rotation away from construction creates negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint divergence shows no statistical correlation with 20-day forward returns, or interaction term coefficient is insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the index of industrial production during a late-cycle expansion confirms supply chain bottlenecks and profit margin compression, forecasting negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict negative returns when industrial production declines, or Rank IC drops below 0.02 in late-cycle regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth exceeding 2.0 percent reflects robust aggregate demand that supports corporate earnings and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in >55% of high GDP growth quarters, or the series shows zero predictive power over 60-day horizons.

mechanism_narrative: When the CPI index exceeds 295.0, persistent inflation forces aggressive central bank tightening that compresses equity valuations and yields negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of high inflation observations, or the threshold effect vanishes in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a rising unemployment rate indicates labor force participation expansion that dilutes wage pressures and supports positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative returns in >55% of cases, or the interaction term lacks statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below 1.5 million units during a housing market correction signals a sharp contraction in construction demand that drags down cyclical equity sectors and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power outside of housing correction regimes.
